Container.Name: TradingAgents
Container.Overview:
TradingAgents is a multi-agent LLM financial trading framework. It uses specialized AI agents (analysts, traders, portfolio managers, researchers, and risk managers) to collaborate on trading decisions for stocks.
Set at least one LLM API key in the template, then start the container.
Unraid Container Console: tradingagents analyze -t NVDA tradingagents analyze -t NVDA -d 2024-05-10 --depth 3 tradingagents analyze -t NVDA -p openai-compatible --backend-url http://host:8080/v1 --deep-model x --quick-model y
Without --ticker, runs in interactive mode.
Remote Usage (SSH): ssh -t root@NAS_IP "docker exec TradingAgents tradingagents analyze -t NVDA" ssh root@NAS_IP "docker exec -d TradingAgents sh -c 'tradingagents analyze -t NVDA > /home/appuser/.tradingagents/logs/NVDA.log 2>&1'" ssh root@NAS_IP "docker exec TradingAgents tail -f /home/appuser/.tradingagents/logs/NVDA.log" ssh root@NAS_IP "docker exec TradingAgents cat /home/appuser/.tradingagents/logs/NVDA/$(date +%Y-%m-%d)/reports/final_trade_decision.md"
Reports are generated per ticker in /home/appuser/.tradingagents/logs/: market_report.md, sentiment_report.md, news_report.md, fundamentals_report.md, investment_plan.md, trader_investment_plan.md, final_trade_decision.md
GitHub: https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent data directory for TradingAgents cache, logs, and decision history.

Config.Name: Default LLM Provider
Config.Description: LLM provider for non-interactive mode. Options: openai, anthropic, google, xai, deepseek, qwen, glm, openrouter, ollama, openai-compatible.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenAI (GPT models). Required if using OpenAI provider.

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: API key for Anthropic (Claude models). Required if using Anthropic provider.

Config.Name: Google API Key
Config.Description: API key for Google (Gemini models). Required if using Google provider.

Config.Name: XAI API Key
Config.Description: API key for xAI (Grok models). Required if using xAI provider.

Config.Name: DeepSeek API Key
Config.Description: API key for DeepSeek models. Required if using DeepSeek provider.

Config.Name: DashScope API Key
Config.Description: API key for Alibaba DashScope (Qwen models). Required if using Qwen provider.

Config.Name: ZhiPu API Key
Config.Description: API key for ZhiPu AI (GLM models). Required if using GLM provider.

Config.Name: OpenRouter API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenRouter (multi-model gateway). Required if using OpenRouter provider.

Config.Name: Alpha Vantage API Key
Config.Description: API key for Alpha Vantage market data. Optional — yfinance is used by default.

Config.Name: OpenAI-Compatible Base URL
Config.Description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible API (e.g. http://host:8080/v1). Required when provider is openai-compatible.

Config.Name: Quick Think Model
Config.Description: Model ID for quick-thinking agent (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, qwen-turbo). Used with openai-compatible provider.

Config.Name: Deep Think Model
Config.Description: Model ID for deep-thinking agent (e.g. gpt-4o, qwen-plus). Used with openai-compatible provider.
